platform_decisions.content: Lazy split of git diff stats (shortstat/numstat) from detailed hunks to avoid expensive operations during polling
Transient git state detection via filesystem marker files (MERGE_HEAD etc.) not git commands
Worktree-aware canonical repository identity: findGitRoot (worktree) vs findCanonicalGitRoot (main repo)
In-memory dirty-flag cache invalidation: fs.watchFile marks dirty, async recompute on next access
Filesystem-based ref resolution from .git files with cycle detection via isSafeRefName
Two-column diff render caching via WeakMap keyed by patch identity for O(1) remount
Bounded diff processing: shortstat gating at 500 files, 1MB per-file cap, MAX_LINES_PER_FILE cap
V8 string slicing prevention in diff parsing: force flat string allocation to enable parent GC
